models.name: Whisper Tiny
models.description: Smallest and fastest canonical Whisper model. Best for low-power machines and quick tests.
models.recommended_hardware: Any supported machine. Lowest memory and CPU requirements.

models.name: Whisper Base
models.description: Fast canonical Whisper model with better accuracy than tiny. Good baseline for CPU use.
models.recommended_hardware: Any supported machine. Suitable for CPU transcription.

models.name: Whisper Small
models.description: Balanced canonical Whisper model for everyday transcription on modest hardware.
models.recommended_hardware: 8GB+ RAM recommended. Usable on CPU; faster with GPU acceleration.

models.name: Whisper Medium
models.description: Higher-accuracy canonical Whisper model for users who can trade speed for quality.
models.recommended_hardware: 16GB+ RAM recommended. GPU acceleration recommended for frequent use.

models.name: Whisper Large v3
models.description: Highest-accuracy canonical Whisper model. Best quality, highest resource use.
models.recommended_hardware: 16GB+ RAM minimum; 32GB+ RAM or GPU acceleration recommended.

models.name: Whisper Large v3 Turbo
models.description: Fast large-v3-derived Whisper model with a strong speed/accuracy tradeoff. Recommended default local model.
models.recommended_hardware: 16GB+ RAM recommended. Good default for local transcription; GPU acceleration improves latency.

models.name: KB Whisper Large
models.description: Swedish Whisper large model by KBLab, National Library of Sweden. Optimized for Swedish transcription.
models.recommended_hardware: 16GB+ RAM minimum; 32GB+ RAM or GPU acceleration recommended.

models.name: NB Whisper Large
models.description: Norwegian Whisper large model by the National Library of Norway AI Lab. Supports Bokmal, Nynorsk, Norwegian, and English.
models.recommended_hardware: 16GB+ RAM minimum; 32GB+ RAM or GPU acceleration recommended.
